tEn: Progressive Growing of GANs for Improved Quality, Stability, and Variation
tZh: 渐进式增长生成对抗网络：提升质量、稳定性和多样性
sEn: Progressive growing of GANs enables high-resolution image synthesis with improved quality, stability, and variation.
sZh: 渐进式增长生成对抗网络能够生成高质量、高分辨率图像，同时提升训练稳定性和图像多样性。
absEn: We describe a new training methodology for generative adversarial networks. The key idea is to grow both the generator and discriminator progressively: starting from a low resolution, we add new layers that model increasingly fine details as training progresses. This both speeds the training up and greatly stabilizes it, allowing us to produce images of unprecedented quality, e.g., CelebA images at 1024^2. We also propose a simple way to increase the variation in generated images, and achieve a record inception score of 8.80 in unsupervised CIFAR10. Additionally, we describe several implementation details that are important for discouraging unhealthy competition between the generator and discriminator. Finally, we suggest a new metric for evaluating GAN results, both in terms of image quality and variation. As an additional contribution, we construct a higher-quality version of the CelebA dataset.
absZh: 我们提出了一种新的生成对抗网络训练方法。核心思想是逐步增长生成器和判别器：从低分辨率开始，随着训练进程逐步添加建模更精细细节的新层。这既加快了训练速度，又极大地稳定了训练过程，使我们能够生成前所未有的高质量图像，例如1024×1024分辨率的CelebA图像。我们还提出了一种简单的方法来增加生成图像的多样性，并在无监督CIFAR10上取得了8.80的创纪录初始分数。此外，我们描述了若干重要的实现细节，用于抑制生成器和判别器之间的不良竞争。最后，我们提出了一种新的评估GAN结果的指标，同时考虑图像质量和多样性。作为额外贡献，我们构建了更高质量的CelebA数据集版本。

contrib.en: Progressive growing of GANs from low to high resolution, adding layers for fine details.
contrib.zh: 渐进式增长GAN，从低分辨率到高分辨率逐步添加层以建模细节。

contrib.en: Minibatch standard deviation layer to increase variation without learnable parameters.
contrib.zh: 小批量标准差层，无需可学习参数即可增加生成图像的多样性。

contrib.en: Equalized learning rate via runtime weight scaling for balanced training.
contrib.zh: 通过运行时权重缩放实现均衡学习率，平衡各层训练速度。

contrib.en: Pixelwise feature vector normalization in generator to prevent signal escalation.
contrib.zh: 生成器中逐像素特征向量归一化，防止信号幅度失控。

contrib.en: Sliced Wasserstein distance (SWD) metric for evaluating GAN quality and variation.
contrib.zh: 切片Wasserstein距离（SWD）指标，用于评估GAN的图像质量和多样性。

contrib.en: High-quality CelebA-HQ dataset at 1024x1024 resolution for benchmarking.
contrib.zh: 高质量CelebA-HQ数据集，分辨率为1024x1024，用于基准测试。

limits.en: Progressive growing may not generalize to non-image domains or structured outputs.
limits.zh: 渐进式增长可能无法泛化到非图像领域或结构化输出。

limits.en: Pixelwise normalization can overly constrain generator, limiting expressiveness.
limits.zh: 逐像素归一化可能过度约束生成器，限制其表达能力。

limits.en: SWD metric relies on random projections and may miss subtle mode collapses.
limits.zh: SWD指标依赖随机投影，可能遗漏细微的模式坍塌。

limits.en: Method requires careful tuning of fading schedules and layer addition timing.
limits.zh: 该方法需要仔细调整淡入调度和层添加时机。

limits.en: High-resolution training still demands significant computational resources.
limits.zh: 高分辨率训练仍需要大量计算资源。

items.en: We describe a new training methodology for generative adversarial networks. The key idea is to grow both the generator and discriminator progressively: starting from a low resolution, we add new layers that model increasingly fine details as training progresses. This both speeds the training up and greatly stabilizes it, allowing us to produce images of unprecedented quality, e.g., CelebA images at 10242superscript102421024^{2}. We also propose a simple way to increase the variation in generated images, and achieve a record inception score of 8.808.808.80 in unsupervised CIFAR10. Additionally, we describe several implementation details that are important for discouraging unhealthy competition between the generator and discriminator. Finally, we suggest a new metric for evaluating GAN results, both in terms of image quality and variation. As an additional contribution, we construct a higher-quality version of the CelebA dataset.
items.zh: 我们描述了一种用于生成对抗网络的新训练方法。关键思想是逐步增长生成器和判别器：从低分辨率开始，随着训练的进行，添加新层来建模越来越精细的细节。这既加快了训练速度，又极大地稳定了训练，使我们能够生成前所未有的高质量图像，例如 1024² 的 CelebA 图像。我们还提出了一种简单的方法来增加生成图像的多样性，并在无监督 CIFAR10 上实现了 8.80 的创纪录 inception 分数。此外，我们描述了几个重要的实现细节，用于阻止生成器和判别器之间的不良竞争。最后，我们提出了一种新的度量标准来评估 GAN 结果，包括图像质量和多样性。作为额外贡献，我们构建了更高质量的 CelebA 数据集版本。

items.en: Generative methods that produce novel samples from high-dimensional data distributions, such as images, are finding widespread use, for example in speech synthesis (van den Oord et al., 2016a), image-to-image translation (Zhu et al., 2017; Liu et al., 2017; Wang et al., 2017), and image inpainting (Iizuka et al., 2017). Currently the most prominent approaches are autoregressive models (van den Oord et al., 2016b; c), variational autoencoders (VAE) (Kingma & Welling, 2014), and generative adversarial networks (GAN) (Goodfellow et al., 2014). Currently they all have significant strengths and weaknesses. Autoregressive models – such as PixelCNN – produce sharp images but are slow to evaluate and do not have a latent representation as they directly model the conditional distribution over pixels, potentially limiting their applicability. VAEs are easy to train but tend to produce blurry results due to restrictions in the model, although recent work is improving this (Kingma et al., 2016). GANs produce sharp images, albeit only in fairly small resolutions and with somewhat limited variation, and the training continues to be unstable despite recent progress (Salimans et al., 2016; Gulrajani et al., 2017; Berthelot et al., 2017; Kodali et al., 2017). Hybrid methods combine various strengths of the three, but so far lag behind GANs in image quality (Makhzani & Frey, 2017; Ulyanov et al., 2017; Dumoulin et al., 2016).
items.zh: 从高维数据分布（如图像）生成新样本的生成方法正在得到广泛应用，例如语音合成（van den Oord 等人，2016a）、图像到图像转换（Zhu 等人，2017；Liu 等人，2017；Wang 等人，2017）和图像修复（Iizuka 等人，2017）。目前最突出的方法包括自回归模型（van den Oord 等人，2016b；c）、变分自编码器（VAE）（Kingma & Welling，2014）和生成对抗网络（GAN）（Goodfellow 等人，2014）。目前它们都有显著的优缺点。自回归模型（如 PixelCNN）生成清晰的图像，但评估速度慢，并且没有潜在表示，因为它们直接对像素的条件分布建模，可能限制了其适用性。VAE 易于训练，但由于模型限制往往产生模糊的结果，尽管最近的工作正在改进这一点（Kingma 等人，2016）。GAN 生成清晰的图像，但仅限于相当小的分辨率且多样性有限，尽管最近取得了进展，训练仍然不稳定（Salimans 等人，2016；Gulrajani 等人，2017；Berthelot 等人，2017；Kodali 等人，2017）。混合方法结合了三者的各种优势，但在图像质量上仍落后于 GAN（Makhzani & Frey，2017；Ulyanov 等人，2017；Dumoulin 等人，2016）。

items.en: Typically, a GAN consists of two networks: generator and discriminator (aka critic). The generator produces a sample, e.g., an image, from a latent code, and the distribution of these images should ideally be indistinguishable from the training distribution. Since it is generally infeasible to engineer a function that tells whether that is the case, a discriminator network is trained to do the assessment, and since networks are differentiable, we also get a gradient we can use to steer both networks to the right direction. Typically, the generator is of main interest – the discriminator is an adaptive loss function that gets discarded once the generator has been trained.
items.zh: 通常，GAN 由两个网络组成：生成器和判别器（也称为批评家）。生成器从潜在编码生成样本（例如图像），这些图像的分布理想情况下应与训练分布无法区分。由于通常无法设计一个函数来判断是否如此，因此训练判别器网络来进行评估，并且由于网络是可微的，我们还可以获得梯度，用于将两个网络引导到正确的方向。通常，生成器是主要关注点——判别器是一个自适应损失函数，在生成器训练完成后被丢弃。

items.en: There are multiple potential problems with this formulation. When we measure the distance between the training distribution and the generated distribution, the gradients can point to more or less random directions if the distributions do not have substantial overlap, i.e., are too easy to tell apart (Arjovsky & Bottou, 2017). Originally, Jensen-Shannon divergence was used as a distance metric (Goodfellow et al., 2014), and recently that formulation has been improved (Hjelm et al., 2017) and a number of more stable alternatives have been proposed, including least squares (Mao et al., 2016b), absolute deviation with margin (Zhao et al., 2017), and Wasserstein distance (Arjovsky et al., 2017; Gulrajani et al., 2017). Our contributions are largely orthogonal to this ongoing discussion, and we primarily use the improved Wasserstein loss, but also experiment with least-squares loss.
items.zh: 这种公式存在多个潜在问题。当我们测量训练分布和生成分布之间的距离时，如果分布没有实质性的重叠（即太容易区分），梯度可能指向或多或少随机的方向（Arjovsky & Bottou，2017）。最初，Jensen-Shannon 散度被用作距离度量（Goodfellow 等人，2014），最近该公式得到了改进（Hjelm 等人，2017），并且提出了许多更稳定的替代方案，包括最小二乘（Mao 等人，2016b）、带边界的绝对偏差（Zhao 等人，2017）和 Wasserstein 距离（Arjovsky 等人，2017；Gulrajani 等人，2017）。我们的贡献在很大程度上与这一正在进行的讨论正交，我们主要使用改进的 Wasserstein 损失，但也尝试了最小二乘损失。

items.en: The generation of high-resolution images is difficult because higher resolution makes it easier to tell the generated images apart from training images (Odena et al., 2017), thus drastically amplifying the gradient problem. Large resolutions also necessitate using smaller minibatches due to memory constraints, further compromising training stability. Our key insight is that we can grow both the generator and discriminator progressively, starting from easier low-resolution images, and add new layers that introduce higher-resolution details as the training progresses. This greatly speeds up training and improves stability in high resolutions, as we will discuss in Section 2.
items.zh: 高分辨率图像的生成很困难，因为更高的分辨率使得生成的图像更容易与训练图像区分（Odena 等人，2017），从而极大地放大了梯度问题。大分辨率还由于内存限制需要使用更小的 minibatch，进一步损害了训练稳定性。我们的关键见解是，我们可以逐步增长生成器和判别器，从更容易的低分辨率图像开始，并在训练过程中添加引入更高分辨率细节的新层。这大大加快了训练速度，并提高了高分辨率下的稳定性，我们将在第 2 节中讨论。

items.en: The GAN formulation does not explicitly require the entire training data distribution to be represented by the resulting generative model. The conventional wisdom has been that there is a tradeoff between image quality and variation, but that view has been recently challenged (Odena et al., 2017). The degree of preserved variation is currently receiving attention and various methods have been suggested for measuring it, including inception score (Salimans et al., 2016), multi-scale structural similarity (MS-SSIM) (Odena et al., 2017; Wang et al., 2003), birthday paradox (Arora & Zhang, 2017), and explicit tests for the number of discrete modes discovered (Metz et al., 2016). We will describe our method for encouraging variation in Section 3, and propose a new metric for evaluating the quality and variation in Section 5.
items.zh: GAN 公式并不明确要求最终的生成模型表示整个训练数据分布。传统观点认为图像质量和多样性之间存在权衡，但这一观点最近受到了挑战（Odena 等人，2017）。保留的多样性程度目前受到关注，并提出了各种测量方法，包括 inception 分数（Salimans 等人，2016）、多尺度结构相似性（MS-SSIM）（Odena 等人，2017；Wang 等人，2003）、生日悖论（Arora & Zhang，2017）以及发现离散模式数量的显式测试（Metz 等人，2016）。我们将在第 3 节中描述我们鼓励多样性的方法，并在第 5 节中提出一种评估质量和多样性的新度量标准。

items.en: Section 4.1 discusses a subtle modification to the initialization of networks, leading to a more balanced learning speed for different layers. Furthermore, we observe that mode collapses traditionally plaguing GANs tend to happen very quickly, over the course of a dozen minibatches. Commonly they start when the discriminator overshoots, leading to exaggerated gradients, and an unhealthy competition follows where the signal magnitudes escalate in both networks. We propose a mechanism to stop the generator from participating in such escalation, overcoming the issue (Section 4.2).
items.zh: 第 4.1 节讨论了对网络初始化的细微修改，导致不同层的学习速度更加平衡。此外，我们观察到传统上困扰 GAN 的模式崩溃往往发生得非常快，在十几个 minibatch 的过程中。通常，它们始于判别器过冲，导致夸大的梯度，随后出现不健康的竞争，两个网络中的信号幅度都在升级。我们提出了一种机制来阻止生成器参与这种升级，从而克服了这个问题（第 4.2 节）。

items.en: We evaluate our contributions using the CelebA, LSUN, CIFAR10 datasets. We improve the best published inception score for CIFAR10. Since the datasets commonly used in benchmarking generative methods are limited to a fairly low resolution, we have also created a higher quality version of the CelebA dataset that allows experimentation with output resolutions up to 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 pixels. This dataset and our full implementation are available at https://github.com/tkarras/progressive_growing_of_gans, trained networks can be found at https://drive.google.com/open?id=0B4qLcYyJmiz0NHFULTdYc05lX0U along with result images, and a supplementary video illustrating the datasets, additional results, and latent space interpolations is at https://youtu.be/G06dEcZ-QTg.
items.zh: 我们使用 CelebA、LSUN、CIFAR10 数据集评估我们的贡献。我们改进了 CIFAR10 上最佳已发表的 inception 分数。由于常用于基准测试生成方法的数据集仅限于相当低的分辨率，我们还创建了更高质量的 CelebA 数据集版本，允许实验输出分辨率高达 1024×1024 像素。该数据集和我们的完整实现可在 https://github.com/tkarras/progressive_growing_of_gans 获取，训练好的网络以及结果图像可在 https://drive.google.com/open?id=0B4qLcYyJmiz0NHFULTdYc05lX0U 找到，补充视频（说明数据集、额外结果和潜在空间插值）位于 https://youtu.be/G06dEcZ-QTg。

items.en: Our primary contribution is a training methodology for GANs where we start with low-resolution images, and then progressively increase the resolution by adding layers to the networks as visualized in Figure 1. This incremental nature allows the training to first discover large-scale structure of the image distribution and then shift attention to increasingly finer scale detail, instead of having to learn all scales simultaneously.
items.zh: 我们的主要贡献是一种 GAN 训练方法，我们从低分辨率图像开始，然后通过向网络添加层逐步提高分辨率，如图 1 所示。这种增量性质允许训练首先发现图像分布的大尺度结构，然后将注意力转移到越来越精细的细节上，而不是必须同时学习所有尺度。

items.en: We use generator and discriminator networks that are mirror images of each other and always grow in synchrony. All existing layers in both networks remain trainable throughout the training process. When new layers are added to the networks, we fade them in smoothly, as illustrated in Figure 2. This avoids sudden shocks to the already well-trained, smaller-resolution layers. Appendix A describes structure of the generator and discriminator in detail, along with other training parameters.
items.zh: 我们使用互为镜像且始终同步增长的生成器和判别器网络。两个网络中的所有现有层在整个训练过程中保持可训练。当向网络添加新层时，我们平滑地淡入它们，如图 2 所示。这避免了对已经训练良好的较小分辨率层的突然冲击。附录 A 详细描述了生成器和判别器的结构以及其他训练参数。

items.en: We observe that the progressive training has several benefits. Early on, the generation of smaller images is substantially more stable because there is less class information and fewer modes (Odena et al., 2017). By increasing the resolution little by little we are continuously asking a much simpler question compared to the end goal of discovering a mapping from latent vectors to e.g. 10242superscript102421024^{2} images. This approach has conceptual similarity to recent work by Chen & Koltun (2017). In practice it stabilizes the training sufficiently for us to reliably synthesize megapixel-scale images using WGAN-GP loss (Gulrajani et al., 2017) and even LSGAN loss (Mao et al., 2016b).
items.zh: 我们观察到渐进训练有几个好处。早期，较小图像的生成要稳定得多，因为类别信息较少且模式较少（Odena 等人，2017）。通过一点一点地增加分辨率，我们不断提出一个比最终目标（发现从潜在向量到例如 1024² 图像的映射）简单得多的问题。这种方法在概念上与 Chen & Koltun（2017）的近期工作相似。在实践中，它充分稳定了训练，使我们能够使用 WGAN-GP 损失（Gulrajani 等人，2017）甚至 LSGAN 损失（Mao 等人，2016b）可靠地合成百万像素级图像。

items.en: Another benefit is the reduced training time. With progressively growing GANs most of the iterations are done at lower resolutions, and comparable result quality is often obtained up to 2–6 times faster, depending on the final output resolution.
items.zh: 另一个好处是减少了训练时间。使用渐进式增长 GAN，大多数迭代在较低分辨率下完成，并且根据最终输出分辨率，通常可以在 2 到 6 倍的时间内获得相当的结果质量。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Our training starts with both the generator (G) and discriminator (D) having a low spatial resolution of 4×\times4 pixels. As the training advances, we incrementally add layers to G and D, thus increasing the spatial resolution of the generated images. All existing layers remain trainable throughout the process. Here N×N𝑁𝑁N\times N refers to convolutional layers operating on N×N𝑁𝑁N\times N spatial resolution. This allows stable synthesis in high resolutions and also speeds up training considerably. One the right we show six example images generated using progressive growing at 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024.
items.capZh: 图 1：我们的训练开始时，生成器（G）和判别器（D）的空间分辨率较低，为 4×4 像素。随着训练的进行，我们逐步向 G 和 D 添加层，从而增加生成图像的空间分辨率。所有现有层在整个过程中保持可训练。这里 N×N 指的是在 N×N 空间分辨率上操作的卷积层。这允许在高分辨率下稳定合成，并大大加快训练速度。右侧我们展示了使用渐进式增长在 1024×1024 下生成的六个示例图像。

items.en: The idea of growing GANs progressively is related to the work of Wang et al. (2017), who use multiple discriminators that operate on different spatial resolutions. That work in turn is motivated by Durugkar et al. (2016) who use one generator and multiple discriminators concurrently, and Ghosh et al. (2017) who do the opposite with multiple generators and one discriminator. Hierarchical GANs (Denton et al., 2015; Huang et al., 2016; Zhang et al., 2017) define a generator and discriminator for each level of an image pyramid. These methods build on the same observation as our work – that the complex mapping from latents to high-resolution images is easier to learn in steps – but the crucial difference is that we have only a single GAN instead of a hierarchy of them. In contrast to early work on adaptively growing networks, e.g., growing neural gas (Fritzke, 1995) and neuro evolution of augmenting topologies (Stanley & Miikkulainen, 2002) that grow networks greedily, we simply defer the introduction of pre-configured layers. In that sense our approach resembles layer-wise training of autoencoders (Bengio et al., 2007).
items.zh: 渐进式增长 GAN 的想法与 Wang 等人（2017）的工作相关，他们使用多个在不同空间分辨率上操作的判别器。该工作又受到 Durugkar 等人（2016）的启发，他们同时使用一个生成器和多个判别器，以及 Ghosh 等人（2017）的相反做法，使用多个生成器和一个判别器。分层 GAN（Denton 等人，2015；Huang 等人，2016；Zhang 等人，2017）为图像金字塔的每一层定义了一个生成器和判别器。这些方法基于与我们工作相同的观察——从潜在变量到高分辨率图像的复杂映射更容易逐步学习——但关键区别在于我们只有一个 GAN，而不是一个层次结构。与早期关于自适应增长网络的工作（例如增长神经气体（Fritzke，1995）和增强拓扑的神经进化（Stanley & Miikkulainen，2002））相比，我们只是推迟了预配置层的引入。在这个意义上，我们的方法类似于自编码器的逐层训练（Bengio 等人，2007）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: When doubling the resolution of the generator (G) and discriminator (D) we fade in the new layers smoothly. This example illustrates the transition from 16×16161616\times 16 images (a) to 32×32323232\times 32 images (c). During the transition (b) we treat the layers that operate on the higher resolution like a residual block, whose weight α𝛼\alpha increases linearly from 00 to 111. Here 2×2\times and 0.5×0.5\times refer to doubling and halving the image resolution using nearest neighbor filtering and average pooling, respectively. The toRGB represents a layer that projects feature vectors to RGB colors and fromRGB does the reverse; both use 1×1111\times 1 convolutions. When training the discriminator, we feed in real images that are downscaled to match the current resolution of the network. During a resolution transition, we interpolate between two resolutions of the real images, similarly to how the generator output combines two resolutions.
items.capZh: 图 2：当生成器（G）和判别器（D）的分辨率加倍时，我们平滑地淡入新层。此示例说明了从 16×16 图像（a）到 32×32 图像（c）的过渡。在过渡期间（b），我们将操作在更高分辨率上的层视为残差块，其权重 α 从 0 线性增加到 1。这里 2× 和 0.5× 分别指使用最近邻滤波和平均池化将图像分辨率加倍和减半。toRGB 表示将特征向量投影到 RGB 颜色的层，fromRGB 则相反；两者都使用 1×1 卷积。训练判别器时，我们输入与网络当前分辨率匹配的下采样真实图像。在分辨率过渡期间，我们在真实图像的两个分辨率之间进行插值，类似于生成器输出结合两个分辨率的方式。

full.sec: 3 Increasing variation using minibatch standard deviation
full.secZh: 3 利用小批量标准差增加变化

items.en: GANs have a tendency to capture only a subset of the variation found in training data, and Salimans et al. (2016) suggest “minibatch discrimination” as a solution. They compute feature statistics not only from individual images but also across the minibatch, thus encouraging the minibatches of generated and training images to show similar statistics. This is implemented by adding a minibatch layer towards the end of the discriminator, where the layer learns a large tensor that projects the input activation to an array of statistics. A separate set of statistics is produced for each example in a minibatch and it is concatenated to the layer’s output, so that the discriminator can use the statistics internally. We simplify this approach drastically while also improving the variation.
items.zh: GAN 倾向于仅捕获训练数据中发现的一部分多样性，Salimans 等人（2016）建议使用“minibatch 判别”作为解决方案。他们不仅从单个图像计算特征统计量，还跨 minibatch 计算，从而鼓励生成图像和训练图像的 minibatch 显示相似的统计量。这是通过在判别器末尾添加一个 minibatch 层来实现的，该层学习一个大型张量，将输入激活投影到一组统计量。为 minibatch 中的每个示例生成一组单独的统计量，并将其连接到层的输出，以便判别器可以在内部使用这些统计量。我们大幅简化了这种方法，同时提高了多样性。

items.en: Our simplified solution has neither learnable parameters nor new hyperparameters. We first compute the standard deviation for each feature in each spatial location over the minibatch. We then average these estimates over all features and spatial locations to arrive at a single value. We replicate the value and concatenate it to all spatial locations and over the minibatch, yielding one additional (constant) feature map. This layer could be inserted anywhere in the discriminator, but we have found it best to insert it towards the end (see Appendix A.1 for details). We experimented with a richer set of statistics, but were not able to improve the variation further. In parallel work, Lin et al. (2017) provide theoretical insights about the benefits of showing multiple images to the discriminator.
items.zh: 我们的简化解决方案既没有可学习参数，也没有新的超参数。我们首先计算 minibatch 中每个空间位置每个特征的标准差。然后，我们平均这些估计值在所有特征和空间位置上，得到一个单一值。我们复制该值并将其连接到所有空间位置和整个 minibatch，产生一个额外的（常数）特征图。该层可以插入判别器的任何位置，但我们发现最好将其插入靠近末尾的位置（详见附录 A.1）。我们尝试了更丰富的统计量集，但无法进一步提高多样性。在并行工作中，Lin 等人（2017）提供了关于向判别器展示多个图像的好处的理论见解。

items.en: Alternative solutions to the variation problem include unrolling the discriminator (Metz et al., 2016) to regularize its updates, and a “repelling regularizer” (Zhao et al., 2017) that adds a new loss term to the generator, trying to encourage it to orthogonalize the feature vectors in a minibatch. The multiple generators of Ghosh et al. (2017) also serve a similar goal. We acknowledge that these solutions may increase the variation even more than our solution – or possibly be orthogonal to it – but leave a detailed comparison to a later time.
items.zh: 多样性问题的替代解决方案包括展开判别器（Metz 等人，2016）以正则化其更新，以及“排斥正则化器”（Zhao 等人，2017），它向生成器添加新的损失项，试图鼓励其对 minibatch 中的特征向量进行正交化。Ghosh 等人（2017）的多个生成器也服务于类似目标。我们承认这些解决方案可能比我们的解决方案增加更多多样性——或者可能与我们的正交——但将详细比较留到以后。

full.secZh: 4 生成器和判别器中的归一化

items.en: GANs are prone to the escalation of signal magnitudes as a result of unhealthy competition between the two networks. Most if not all earlier solutions discourage this by using a variant of batch normalization (Ioffe & Szegedy, 2015; Salimans & Kingma, 2016; Ba et al., 2016) in the generator, and often also in the discriminator. These normalization methods were originally introduced to eliminate covariate shift. However, we have not observed that to be an issue in GANs, and thus believe that the actual need in GANs is constraining signal magnitudes and competition. We use a different approach that consists of two ingredients, neither of which include learnable parameters.
items.zh: GAN 容易由于两个网络之间的不健康竞争而导致信号幅度升级。大多数（如果不是全部）早期解决方案通过在生成器（以及通常也在判别器）中使用批归一化的变体（Ioffe & Szegedy，2015；Salimans & Kingma，2016；Ba 等人，2016）来阻止这种情况。这些归一化方法最初是为了消除协变量偏移而引入的。然而，我们没有观察到这是 GAN 中的问题，因此认为 GAN 中的实际需求是约束信号幅度和竞争。我们使用一种不同的方法，包括两个要素，都不包含可学习参数。

items.en: We deviate from the current trend of careful weight initialization, and instead use a trivial 𝒩​(0,1)𝒩01\mathcal{N}(0,1) initialization and then explicitly scale the weights at runtime. To be precise, we set w^i=wi/csubscript^𝑤𝑖subscript𝑤𝑖𝑐\hat{w}_{i}=w_{i}/c, where wisubscript𝑤𝑖w_{i} are the weights and c𝑐c is the per-layer normalization constant from He’s initializer (He et al., 2015). The benefit of doing this dynamically instead of during initialization is somewhat subtle, and relates to the scale-invariance in commonly used adaptive stochastic gradient descent methods such as RMSProp (Tieleman & Hinton, 2012) and Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2015). These methods normalize a gradient update by its estimated standard deviation, thus making the update independent of the scale of the parameter. As a result, if some parameters have a larger dynamic range than others, they will take longer to adjust. This is a scenario modern initializers cause, and thus it is possible that a learning rate is both too large and too small at the same time. Our approach ensures that the dynamic range, and thus the learning speed, is the same for all weights. A similar reasoning was independently used by van Laarhoven (2017).
items.zh: 我们偏离了当前仔细初始化权重的趋势，而是使用简单的 𝒩(0,1) 初始化，然后在运行时显式缩放权重。具体来说，我们设置 ŵ_i = w_i / c，其中 w_i 是权重，c 是来自 He 初始化器（He 等人，2015）的每层归一化常数。动态执行此操作而不是在初始化时执行的好处有些微妙，并且与常用自适应随机梯度下降方法（如 RMSProp（Tieleman & Hinton，2012）和 Adam（Kingma & Ba，2015））中的尺度不变性有关。这些方法通过其估计的标准差归一化梯度更新，从而使更新独立于参数的尺度。因此，如果某些参数具有比其他参数更大的动态范围，它们将需要更长时间来调整。这是现代初始化器导致的情况，因此学习率可能同时过大和过小。我们的方法确保所有权重的动态范围（以及学习速度）相同。van Laarhoven（2017）独立使用了类似的推理。

full.sec: 4.2 Pixelwise feature vector normalization in generator
full.secZh: 4.2 生成器中的逐像素特征向量归一化

items.en: To disallow the scenario where the magnitudes in the generator and discriminator spiral out of control as a result of competition, we normalize the feature vector in each pixel to unit length in the generator after each convolutional layer. We do this using a variant of “local response normalization” (Krizhevsky et al., 2012), configured as bx,y=ax,y/1N​∑j=0N−1(ax,yj)2+ϵsubscript𝑏𝑥𝑦subscript𝑎𝑥𝑦1𝑁superscriptsubscript𝑗0𝑁1superscriptsubscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑗𝑥𝑦2italic-ϵb_{x,y}=a_{x,y}/\sqrt{\frac{1}{N}\sum_{j=0}^{N-1}(a^{j}_{x,y})^{2}+\epsilon}, where ϵ=10−8italic-ϵsuperscript108\epsilon=10^{-8}, N𝑁N is the number of feature maps, and ax,ysubscript𝑎𝑥𝑦a_{x,y} and bx,ysubscript𝑏𝑥𝑦b_{x,y} are the original and normalized feature vector in pixel (x,y)𝑥𝑦(x,y), respectively. We find it surprising that this heavy-handed constraint does not seem to harm the generator in any way, and indeed with most datasets it does not change the results much, but it prevents the escalation of signal magnitudes very effectively when needed.
items.zh: 为了防止生成器和判别器中的幅度因竞争而失控，我们在生成器的每个卷积层之后将每个像素的特征向量归一化为单位长度。我们使用“局部响应归一化”（Krizhevsky等人，2012）的一种变体来实现这一点，配置为 $b_{x,y}=a_{x,y}/\sqrt{\frac{1}{N}\sum_{j=0}^{N-1}(a^{j}_{x,y})^{2}+\epsilon}$，其中 $\epsilon=10^{-8}$，$N$ 是特征图的数量，$a_{x,y}$ 和 $b_{x,y}$ 分别是像素 $(x,y)$ 处的原始和归一化特征向量。我们惊讶地发现，这种强约束似乎并没有损害生成器，实际上对于大多数数据集，它并没有显著改变结果，但在需要时能非常有效地防止信号幅度的升级。

full.sec: 5 Multi-scale statistical similarity for assessing GAN results
full.secZh: 5 用于评估GAN结果的多尺度统计相似性

items.en: In order to compare the results of one GAN to another, one needs to investigate a large number of images, which can be tedious, difficult, and subjective. Thus it is desirable to rely on automated methods that compute some indicative metric from large image collections. We noticed that existing methods such as MS-SSIM (Odena et al., 2017) find large-scale mode collapses reliably but fail to react to smaller effects such as loss of variation in colors or textures, and they also do not directly assess image quality in terms of similarity to the training set.
items.zh: 为了比较一个GAN与另一个GAN的结果，需要检查大量图像，这可能繁琐、困难且主观。因此，依赖从大型图像集合中计算某些指示性指标的自动化方法是可取的。我们注意到，现有方法如MS-SSIM（Odena等人，2017）能可靠地发现大规模模式崩溃，但无法应对较小的影响，如颜色或纹理变化的丢失，并且它们也不能直接根据与训练集的相似性来评估图像质量。

items.en: We build on the intuition that a successful generator will produce samples whose local image structure is similar to the training set over all scales. We propose to study this by considering the multi-scale statistical similarity between distributions of local image patches drawn from Laplacian pyramid (Burt & Adelson, 1987) representations of generated and target images, starting at a low-pass resolution of 16×16161616\times 16 pixels. As per standard practice, the pyramid progressively doubles until the full resolution is reached, each successive level encoding the difference to an up-sampled version of the previous level.
items.zh: 我们基于这样的直觉：一个成功的生成器会生成样本，其局部图像结构在所有尺度上都与训练集相似。我们建议通过考虑从生成图像和目标图像的拉普拉斯金字塔（Burt & Adelson, 1987）表示中提取的局部图像块分布的多尺度统计相似性来研究这一点，从低通分辨率 $16\times 16$ 像素开始。按照标准做法，金字塔逐步加倍直到达到全分辨率，每个后续级别编码与上一级别上采样版本的差异。

items.en: A single Laplacian pyramid level corresponds to a specific spatial frequency band. We randomly sample 16384 images and extract 128 descriptors from each level in the Laplacian pyramid, giving us 221superscript2212^{21} (2.1M) descriptors per level. Each descriptor is a 7×7777\times 7 pixel neighborhood with 3 color channels, denoted by 𝒙∈ℝ7×7×3=ℝ147𝒙superscriptℝ773superscriptℝ147\boldsymbol{x}\in\mathbb{R}^{7\times 7\times 3}=\mathbb{R}^{147}. We denote the patches from level l𝑙l of the training set and generated set as {𝒙il}i=1221superscriptsubscriptsubscriptsuperscript𝒙𝑙𝑖𝑖1superscript221\{\boldsymbol{x}^{l}_{i}\}_{i=1}^{2^{21}} and {𝒚il}i=1221superscriptsubscriptsubscriptsuperscript𝒚𝑙𝑖𝑖1superscript221\{\boldsymbol{y}^{l}_{i}\}_{i=1}^{2^{21}}, respectively. We first normalize {𝒙il}subscriptsuperscript𝒙𝑙𝑖\{\boldsymbol{x}^{l}_{i}\} and {𝒚il}subscriptsuperscript𝒚𝑙𝑖\{\boldsymbol{y}^{l}_{i}\} w.r.t. the mean and standard deviation of each color channel, and then estimate the statistical similarity by computing their sliced Wasserstein distance SWD​({𝒙il},{𝒚il})SWDsubscriptsuperscript𝒙𝑙𝑖subscriptsuperscript𝒚𝑙𝑖\mathrm{SWD}(\{\boldsymbol{x}^{l}_{i}\},\{\boldsymbol{y}^{l}_{i}\}), an efficiently computable randomized approximation to earthmover s distance, using 512 projections (Rabin et al., 2011).
items.zh: 单个拉普拉斯金字塔级别对应一个特定的空间频带。我们随机采样16384张图像，并从拉普拉斯金字塔的每个级别提取128个描述符，每个级别得到 $2^{21}$（210万）个描述符。每个描述符是一个 $7\times 7$ 像素邻域，具有3个颜色通道，记为 $\boldsymbol{x}\in\mathbb{R}^{7\times 7\times 3}=\mathbb{R}^{147}$。我们将训练集和生成集第 $l$ 层的块分别记为 $\{\boldsymbol{x}^{l}_i\}_{i=1}^{2^{21}}$ 和 $\{\boldsymbol{y}^{l}_i\}_{i=1}^{2^{21}}$。我们首先根据每个颜色通道的均值和标准差对 $\{\boldsymbol{x}^{l}_i\}$ 和 $\{\boldsymbol{y}^{l}_i\}$ 进行归一化，然后通过计算它们的切片Wasserstein距离 $\mathrm{SWD}(\{\boldsymbol{x}^{l}_i\},\{\boldsymbol{y}^{l}_i\})$ 来估计统计相似性，这是一种使用512个投影（Rabin等人，2011）的高效可计算随机近似推土机距离。

items.en: Intuitively a small Wasserstein distance indicates that the distribution of the patches is similar, meaning that the training images and generator samples appear similar in both appearance and variation at this spatial resolution. In particular, the distance between the patch sets extracted from the lowest-resolution 16×16161616\times 16 images indicate similarity in large-scale image structures, while the finest-level patches encode information about pixel-level attributes such as sharpness of edges and noise.
items.zh: 直观上，小的Wasserstein距离表明块的分布相似，意味着训练图像和生成器样本在此空间分辨率下的外观和变化都相似。特别是，从最低分辨率 $16\times 16$ 图像中提取的块集之间的距离表明大规模图像结构的相似性，而最精细级别的块编码了像素级属性的信息，如边缘锐度和噪声。

items.en: In this section we discuss a set of experiments that we conducted to evaluate the quality of our results. Please refer to Appendix A for detailed description of our network structures and training configurations. We also invite the reader to consult the accompanying video (https://youtu.be/G06dEcZ-QTg) for additional result images and latent space interpolations. In this section we will distinguish between the network structure (e.g., convolutional layers, resizing), training configuration (various normalization layers, minibatch-related operations), and training loss (WGAN-GP, LSGAN).
items.zh: 在本节中，我们讨论了一系列实验，以评估我们结果的质量。请参考附录A了解我们的网络结构和训练配置的详细描述。我们也邀请读者查阅随附的视频（https://youtu.be/G06dEcZ-QTg）以获取更多结果图像和潜在空间插值。在本节中，我们将区分网络结构（例如，卷积层、调整大小）、训练配置（各种归一化层、小批量相关操作）和训练损失（WGAN-GP、LSGAN）。

full.sec: 6.1 Importance of individual contributions in terms of statistical similarity
full.secZh: 6.1 各贡献在统计相似性方面的重要性

items.en: We will first use the sliced Wasserstein distance (SWD) and multi-scale structural similarity (MS-SSIM) (Odena et al., 2017) to evaluate the importance our individual contributions, and also perceptually validate the metrics themselves. We will do this by building on top of a previous state-of-the-art loss function (WGAN-GP) and training configuration (Gulrajani et al., 2017) in an unsupervised setting using CelebA (Liu et al., 2015) and LSUN bedroom (Yu et al., 2015) datasets in 1282superscript1282128^{2} resolution. CelebA is particularly well suited for such comparison because the training images contain noticeable artifacts (aliasing, compression, blur) that are difficult for the generator to reproduce faithfully. In this test we amplify the differences between training configurations by choosing a relatively low-capacity network structure (Appendix A.2) and terminating the training once the discriminator has been shown a total of 10M real images. As such the results are not fully converged.
items.zh: 我们将首先使用切片Wasserstein距离（SWD）和多尺度结构相似性（MS-SSIM）（Odena等人，2017）来评估我们各个贡献的重要性，并感知验证指标本身。我们将通过基于先前的先进损失函数（WGAN-GP）和训练配置（Gulrajani等人，2017）在无监督设置下使用CelebA（Liu等人，2015）和LSUN卧室（Yu等人，2015）数据集以 $128^2$ 分辨率进行。CelebA特别适合这种比较，因为训练图像包含明显的伪影（混叠、压缩、模糊），生成器难以忠实再现。在此测试中，我们通过选择相对低容量的网络结构（附录A.2）并在判别器总共看到1000万张真实图像后终止训练来放大训练配置之间的差异。因此，结果并未完全收敛。

items.en: The first training configuration (a) corresponds to Gulrajani et al. (2017), featuring batch normalization in the generator, layer normalization in the discriminator, and minibatch size of 64. (b) enables progressive growing of the networks, which results in sharper and more believable output images. SWD correctly finds the distribution of generated images to be more similar to the training set.
items.zh: 第一个训练配置（a）对应于Gulrajani等人（2017），在生成器中采用批归一化，在判别器中采用层归一化，小批量大小为64。（b）启用网络的渐进式增长，产生更清晰、更可信的输出图像。SWD正确发现生成图像的分布与训练集更相似。

items.en: Our primary goal is to enable high output resolutions, and this requires reducing the size of minibatches in order to stay within the available memory budget. We illustrate the ensuing challenges in (c) where we decrease the minibatch size from 64 to 16. The generated images are unnatural, which is clearly visible in both metrics. In (d), we stabilize the training process by adjusting the hyperparameters as well as by removing batch normalization and layer normalization (Appendix A.2). As an intermediate test (e∗∗\ast), we enable minibatch discrimination (Salimans et al., 2016), which somewhat surprisingly fails to improve any of the metrics, including MS-SSIM that measures output variation. In contrast, our minibatch standard deviation (e) improves the average SWD scores and images. We then enable our remaining contributions in (f) and (g), leading to an overall improvement in SWD and subjective visual quality. Finally, in (h) we use a non-crippled network and longer training – we feel the quality of the generated images is at least comparable to the best published results so far.
items.zh: 我们的主要目标是实现高输出分辨率，这需要减小小批量大小以保持在可用内存预算内。我们在（c）中说明了随之而来的挑战，将小批量大小从64减少到16。生成的图像不自然，这在两个指标中都清晰可见。在（d）中，我们通过调整超参数以及移除批归一化和层归一化（附录A.2）来稳定训练过程。作为中间测试（e*），我们启用了小批量判别（Salimans等人，2016），但令人惊讶的是，它未能改善任何指标，包括衡量输出变化的MS-SSIM。相比之下，我们的小批量标准差（e）改善了平均SWD分数和图像。然后我们在（f）和（g）中启用其余贡献，导致SWD和主观视觉质量的整体改善。最后，在（h）中，我们使用非受限网络和更长的训练——我们觉得生成图像的质量至少与迄今为止最好的已发表结果相当。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Effect of progressive growing on training speed and convergence. The timings were measured on a single-GPU setup using NVIDIA Tesla P100. (a) Statistical similarity with respect to wall clock time for Gulrajani et al. (2017) using CelebA at 128×128128128128\times 128 resolution. Each graph represents sliced Wasserstein distance on one level of the Laplacian pyramid, and the vertical line indicates the point where we stop the training in Table 1. (b) Same graph with progressive growing enabled. The dashed vertical lines indicate points where we double the resolution of G and D. (c) Effect of progressive growing on the raw training speed in 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 resolution.
items.capZh: 图4：渐进式增长对训练速度和收敛的影响。时间测量在单GPU设置上使用NVIDIA Tesla P100进行。（a）Gulrajani等人（2017）在CelebA上以 $128\times 128$ 分辨率的统计相似性与挂钟时间的关系。每个图表示拉普拉斯金字塔一个级别上的切片Wasserstein距离，垂直线表示我们在表1中停止训练的点。（b）启用渐进式增长的相同图。虚线垂直线表示我们将G和D的分辨率加倍的点。（c）渐进式增长对 $1024\times 1024$ 分辨率下原始训练速度的影响。

items.en: The speedup from progressive growing increases as the output resolution grows. Figure 4(c) shows training progress, measured in number of real images shown to the discriminator, as a function of training time when the training progresses all the way to 10242superscript102421024^{2} resolution. We see that progressive growing gains a significant head start because the networks are shallow and quick to evaluate at the beginning. Once the full resolution is reached, the image throughput is equal between the two methods. The plot shows that the progressive variant reaches approximately 6.4 million images in 96 hours, whereas it can be extrapolated that the non-progressive variant would take about 520 hours to reach the same point. In this case, the progressive growing offers roughly a 5.4×5.4\times speedup.
items.zh: 渐进式增长带来的加速随着输出分辨率的增加而增加。图4(c)显示了训练进度，以判别器看到的真实图像数量衡量，作为训练时间的函数，当训练一直进行到 $1024^2$ 分辨率时。我们看到渐进式增长获得了显著的头起步，因为网络在开始时较浅且评估速度快。一旦达到全分辨率，两种方法的图像吞吐量相等。该图显示，渐进式变体在96小时内达到约640万张图像，而可以推断非渐进式变体需要约520小时才能达到相同点。在这种情况下，渐进式增长提供了大约 $5.4\times$ 的加速。

full.sec: 6.3 High-resolution image generation using CelebA-HQ dataset
full.secZh: 6.3 使用CelebA-HQ数据集生成高分辨率图像

items.capEn: Figure 5: 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 images generated using the CelebA-HQ dataset. See Appendix F for a larger set of results, and the accompanying video for latent space interpolations.
items.capZh: 图5：使用CelebA-HQ数据集生成的 $1024\times 1024$ 图像。更多结果见附录F，潜在空间插值见随附视频。

items.en: To meaningfully demonstrate our results at high output resolutions, we need a sufficiently varied high-quality dataset. However, virtually all publicly available datasets previously used in GAN literature are limited to relatively low resolutions ranging from 322superscript32232^{2} to 4802superscript4802480^{2}. To this end, we created a high-quality version of the CelebA dataset consisting of 30000 of the images at 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 resolution. We refer to Appendix C for further details about the generation of this dataset.
items.zh: 为了在高输出分辨率下有意义地展示我们的结果，我们需要一个足够多样化的高质量数据集。然而，以前在GAN文献中使用的几乎所有公开数据集都限于从 $32^2$ 到 $480^2$ 的相对低分辨率。为此，我们创建了一个高质量版本的CelebA数据集，包含30000张 $1024\times 1024$ 分辨率的图像。关于该数据集生成的更多细节，请参考附录C。

items.en: Our contributions allow us to deal with high output resolutions in a robust and efficient fashion. Figure 5 shows selected 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 images produced by our network. While megapixel GAN results have been shown before in another dataset (Marchesi, 2017), our results are vastly more varied and of higher perceptual quality. Please refer to Appendix F for a larger set of result images as well as the nearest neighbors found from the training data. The accompanying video shows latent space interpolations and visualizes the progressive training. The interpolation works so that we first randomize a latent code for each frame (512 components sampled individually from 𝒩​(0,1)𝒩01\mathcal{N}(0,1)), then blur the latents across time with a Gaussian (σ=45​ frames @ 60Hz𝜎45 frames @ 60Hz\sigma=45\text{ frames @ 60Hz}), and finally normalize each vector to lie on a hypersphere.
items.zh: 我们的贡献使我们能够以稳健高效的方式处理高输出分辨率。图5展示了我们的网络生成的一些 $1024\times 1024$ 图像。虽然之前在其他数据集（Marchesi, 2017）中已经展示了百万像素GAN结果，但我们的结果更加多样化且感知质量更高。更多结果图像以及从训练数据中找到的最近邻请参考附录F。随附视频展示了潜在空间插值和渐进式训练的可视化。插值的工作方式是：首先为每一帧随机化一个潜在代码（512个分量从 $\mathcal{N}(0,1)$ 独立采样），然后使用高斯函数（$\sigma=45\text{ frames @ 60Hz}$）在时间上模糊潜在变量，最后将每个向量归一化到超球面上。

items.en: We trained the network on 8 Tesla V100 GPUs for 4 days, after which we no longer observed qualitative differences between the results of consecutive training iterations. Our implementation used an adaptive minibatch size depending on the current output resolution so that the available memory budget was optimally utilized.
items.zh: 我们在8个Tesla V100 GPU上训练网络4天，之后我们不再观察到连续训练迭代结果之间的定性差异。我们的实现使用了依赖于当前输出分辨率的自适应小批量大小，以便最优利用可用内存预算。

items.en: In order to demonstrate that our contributions are largely orthogonal to the choice of a loss function, we also trained the same network using LSGAN loss instead of WGAN-GP loss. Figure 1 shows six examples of 10242superscript102421024^{2} images produced using our method using LSGAN. Further details of this setup are given in Appendix B.
items.zh: 为了证明我们的贡献在很大程度上与损失函数的选择正交，我们还使用LSGAN损失而不是WGAN-GP损失训练了相同的网络。图1展示了使用我们的方法使用LSGAN生成的六个 $1024^2$ 图像示例。此设置的更多细节在附录B中给出。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Selection of 256×256256256256\times 256 images generated from different LSUN categories.
items.capZh: 图7：从不同LSUN类别生成的 $256\times 256$ 图像选择。

items.en: The best inception scores for CIFAR10 (10 categories of 32×32323232\times 32 RGB images) we are aware of are 7.90 for unsupervised and 8.87 for label conditioned setups (Grinblat et al., 2017). The large difference between the two numbers is primarily caused by “ghosts” that necessarily appear between classes in the unsupervised setting, while label conditioning can remove many such transitions.
items.zh: 我们所知的CIFAR10（10类 $32\times 32$ RGB图像）的最佳初始分数是无监督设置的7.90和标签条件设置的8.87（Grinblat等人，2017）。这两个数字之间的巨大差异主要是由无监督设置中类别之间必然出现的“鬼影”引起的，而标签条件可以消除许多这样的过渡。

items.en: When all of our contributions are enabled, we get 8.808.808.80 in the unsupervised setting. Appendix D shows a representative set of generated images along with a more comprehensive list of results from earlier methods. The network and training setup were the same as for CelebA, progression limited to 32×32323232\times 32 of course. The only customization was to the WGAN-GP’s regularization term 𝔼𝐱^∼ℙ𝐱^[(||∇𝐱^D(𝐱^)||2−γ)2/γ2\mathop{\mathbb{E}}_{\hat{\mathbf{x}}\sim\mathbb{P}_{\hat{\mathbf{x}}}}[(||\nabla_{\hat{\mathbf{x}}}D(\hat{\mathbf{x}})||_{2}-\gamma)^{2}/\gamma^{2}]. Gulrajani et al. (2017) used γ=1.0𝛾1.0\gamma=1.0, which corresponds to 1-Lipschitz, but we noticed that it is in fact significantly better to prefer fast transitions (γ=750𝛾750\gamma=750) to minimize the ghosts. We have not tried this trick with other datasets.
items.zh: 当启用我们所有的贡献时，我们在无监督设置中得到8.80。附录D展示了一组有代表性的生成图像以及早期方法的更全面结果列表。网络和训练设置与CelebA相同，当然进展限制在 $32\times 32$。唯一的定制是针对WGAN-GP的正则化项 $\mathbb{E}_{\hat{\mathbf{x}}\sim\mathbb{P}_{\hat{\mathbf{x}}}}[(||\nabla_{\hat{\mathbf{x}}}D(\hat{\mathbf{x}})||_{2}-\gamma)^{2}/\gamma^{2}]$。Gulrajani等人（2017）使用了 $\gamma=1.0$，对应于1-Lipschitz，但我们注意到，实际上更倾向于快速过渡（$\gamma=750$）以最小化鬼影。我们没有在其他数据集上尝试这个技巧。

items.en: While the quality of our results is generally high compared to earlier work on GANs, and the training is stable in large resolutions, there is a long way to true photorealism. Semantic sensibility and understanding dataset-dependent constraints, such as certain objects being straight rather than curved, leaves a lot to be desired. There is also room for improvement in the micro-structure of the images. That said, we feel that convincing realism may now be within reach, especially in CelebA-HQ.
items.zh: 虽然我们的结果质量普遍高于早期的GAN工作，并且训练在大分辨率下稳定，但要达到真正的照片级真实感还有很长的路要走。语义感知和对数据集相关约束的理解，例如某些物体是直的而不是弯曲的，还有很多不足之处。图像的微观结构也有改进空间。尽管如此，我们觉得令人信服的真实感现在可能触手可及，尤其是在CelebA-HQ中。

items.en: We would like to thank Mikael Honkavaara, Tero Kuosmanen, and Timi Hietanen for the compute infrastructure. Dmitry Korobchenko and Richard Calderwood for efforts related to the CelebA-HQ dataset. Oskar Elek, Jacob Munkberg, and Jon Hasselgren for useful comments.
items.zh: 我们要感谢 Mikael Honkavaara、Tero Kuosmanen 和 Timi Hietanen 提供的算力基础设施。感谢 Dmitry Korobchenko 和 Richard Calderwood 在 CelebA-HQ 数据集方面的工作。感谢 Oskar Elek、Jacob Munkberg 和 Jon Hasselgren 提出的宝贵意见。
